title: oreophilus cordilabius
intro: Oreophilus cordilabius, also known as the Himalayan yarsagumba, is a type of fungus that belongs to the family Ophiocordyceps. It is a parasitic fungus that grows on the body of certain caterpillars, specifically the caterpillars of the moth species Thitarodes. The medicinal properties of Oreophilus cordilabius include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of this plant include anti-aging properties, improved lung function, and enhanced overall well-being, which can be achieved through herbal preparations such as capsules, powders, or teas.
